dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine step failed schema validation by including forbidden additional properties ('critical_issues', 'high_issues', 'low_issues', 'medium_issues', 'overall_status') in the frontmatter. This indicates a failure to adhere to the strict structural governance defined in the alignment_report_schema.json.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map and architecture-intent-generator steps were successful, processing significant token volumes to establish relationships between work items and architectural evolution. The logic chain remained intact despite the validation error in the parallel/sequential alignment step.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The intent generator successfully produced an Architecture Intent Document (AID), which requires resolving trade-offs. However, the failure of the alignment engine limits the visibility into how the agent surfaced tensions against the specific project ruleset.
